# The Website Auditor

> The Website Auditor (thewebsiteauditor.com) is a website audit service for small and medium businesses worldwide. We scan websites across 55+ parameters covering lead capture, visitor tracking, retargeting, trust & security, SEO, and AI search visibility — then deliver a prioritized, revenue-focused fix report.

## What We Do

- Free 25-point starter audit (delivered in 1–2 hours, no credit card)
- Pro 55-point audit: one-time $499 — full report, video walkthrough, implementation plan, 60-day support
- Monthly optimization service: $999/month — continuous audits, monitoring, and direct implementation help

## The 6 Audit Pillars

1. Traffic Intelligence & Measurement — GA4, Google Tag Manager, Microsoft Clarity, Hotjar, event tracking
2. Retargeting & Remarketing — Meta Pixel, Google Ads conversion, LinkedIn Insight, Pinterest, TikTok
3. Lead Capture & Conversion — WhatsApp buttons, live chat, contact forms, exit-intent, click-to-call, meeting schedulers, CRM integration
4. Trust & Security — SSL, privacy policy, reviews, trust badges, security headers
5. Discovery, SEO & Performance — schema markup, Open Graph, sitemaps, Core Web Vitals, mobile responsiveness
6. AI Search Visibility (GEO) — llms.txt, AI crawler access (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended), FAQ schema, entity clarity, Bing indexing, AI answer monitoring — so businesses get recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude and future AI platforms

## Industries Served

Dental & medical clinics, plumbing & HVAC trades, construction, e-commerce, real estate, law firms, restaurants, SaaS & IT services, manufacturing, education, financial services, automotive dealerships. Each industry has customized critical/important/nice-to-have audit criteria.

## Why It Matters

Most SME websites leak 30–50% of potential leads through missing tracking, broken lead capture, absent trust signals, and — increasingly — invisibility to AI search engines. Customers now ask AI tools for recommendations instead of searching Google; businesses without AI-readable websites lose those customers to competitors.
